events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the permit-scope-exceeded condition is a **fail** (high risk) — hot work was performed outside the boundaries authorized by the permit, invalidating the fire watch, combustible-clearance, and monitoring controls required by NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J for that area. Corrective actions center on stopping work, reissuing/correcting the permit to match actual scope, and re-verifying fire watch and combustible controls before proceeding.
